parameters: \larWelcome to my diner! Is this your first time here?
In that case, thank you for choosing to eat at
Larry's Marvelous Diner! On behalf of the
\larEach \ii[16] is manually prepared and wrapped, containing
all the nutrients you need for a day on The Trail.
\larNow, I didn't quite catch your name...
\larWell then, \V[202], feel free to seat yourself.
I'll be right there to help you! If you'd
like to take some \ii[16]\c[0]s to go,
I'll be right there to help you!
\larWe don't do menus here! Let me know how big
of a meal you'd like, and I'll make
\larWasn't that great value for 40 Bits? Thanks for
choosing Larry's Marvelous Diner, come again!
\larYou have exquisite taste! Coming right up...
\larYou'll be remembering that for a while! Thanks for
choosing Larry's Marvelous Diner, come again!
\larOh... so I guess you're not hungry?
\solI told him we should take it to the bar before
he got too deep... this is embarassing.
\knightLarry's is one of the best diners I've ever been to...
incredible food for a low price! It's the best value
to feed my men, and they seem to love the food.
\solThis place must be blessed by Trailia...
how is the food so damn good!?
And for such a low price?
\solI could eat here every day... I think I'll order turkey next time!
